title: Steady Fuel
subtitle: Meeting growing energy needs
description: As your body’s nutritional needs continue to rise, you may feel hungry more often. Including balanced meals along with healthy snacks and distributing protein throughout the day can help maintain steady energy and comfort.
what_to_expect: Need for additional snacks between meals
nutrition_focus: Distribute protein intake across the day
Focus on sustained and balanced energy intake
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, guava, and pomegranate
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, carrots, beans, and broccoli
Snacks like nuts, roasted chana, fruit bowls, or curd
Protein sources like milk, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals or ignoring hunger signals
hydration: Drink water regularly throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, or lemon water
reassurance: Eating at regular intervals helps maintain steady energy and supports your body's needs.

diabetes.personalized_description: Frequent and balanced meals with snacks help maintain stable blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Eat small, frequent meals and snacks
Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils, paneer, and nuts
diabetes.reassurance: Regular meals and snacks support steady energy.

anemia.personalized_description: Including iron-rich foods along with regular snacks supports energy levels.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Regular nourishment helps support your energy and strength.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals and snacks with controlled salt intake support stable blood pressure.
nutrition_focus: Keep meals balanced and moderate in salt
hypertension.reassurance: Balanced meals and snacks support a calm routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: Consistent meals and snacks support metabolic balance and energy levels.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency in meals supports your body's rhythm.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, regular meals with healthy snacks help maintain energy and stability.
priority_nutrition: Maintain regular meal and snack timings
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady and frequent nourishment supports your overall well-being.
